focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: BOURNE, anxious and uncertain, questions his citizenship and passport status before abruptly leaving the clerk's window without resolving anything.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: amnesiac unable to confirm citizenship at U.S. consulate
timeline_nodes.salient_development: abandons consulate inquiry after hesitation and uncertainty about passport and citizenship
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to confirm U.S. citizenship and passport status
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: leaves the consulate window without resolving identity questions
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: U.S. citizenship and passport status remain unresolved
evidence_quotes: BOURNE trying to think -- what the fuck is he doing? -- what's he gonna say?
BOURNE Yes. (pause) I mean, I think so. Yes. Yes...
But he's already bailing, walking away from the woman, the window, the room -- he's out of here --

auxiliary.persona_anchor: shows hesitation and uncertainty when questioned by clerk

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 64、EXT. A ROAD ON THE OUTSKIRTS OF ZURICH -- DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: BOURNE offers MARIE twenty thousand dollars to drive him to Paris as if they're a couple, promising she won't get hurt; he threatens to find another ride if she refuses.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: fugitive seeking a ride to Paris
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne offers Marie twenty thousand dollars to drive him to Paris, negotiating terms after initial refusal
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne and Marie agree to travel together to Paris under a paid arrangement
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: uncertainty in Marie's commitment during the journey
evidence_quotes: BOURNE I want to go home.
BOURNE I don't want to go alone. I want you to drive me to Paris. Like we're a couple.
MARIE And I don't get hurt. I get twenty thousand dollars and I don't get hurt.
BOURNE I won't hurt you.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: shows determination and negotiation skills in securing help

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne reveals he has amnesia, unable to remember anything before two weeks ago, shocking Marie, who reacts with anger and disbelief as she speeds dangerously.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bourne reveals his amnesia to Marie
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne states he cannot remember anything before two weeks ago, provoking Marie's disbelief and anger
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marie reacts with fury and drives aggressively after learning of Bourne's amnesia
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Marie's immediate volatile reaction to Bourne's condition
evidence_quotes: What? Like amnesia?

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bourne's direct admission of his memory loss

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Castel, bleeding and panicked, suddenly lunges past Bourne and jumps through the apartment window as the concierge knocks, while Marie remains hysterical and Bourne struggles to respond.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: amnesiac investigating his own identity
timeline_nodes.salient_development: explores impersonal apartment, finds maritime law materials, and learns from phone call that he is in Paris but no Jason Bourne is registered at the hotel
timeline_nodes.goal_state: understand his identity based on apartment clues and phone call
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: in his apartment, confused and actively searching for more clues through his backpack
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: who is Bourne? what is his connection to maritime law? why is the apartment impersonal? what does the phone call imply?
evidence_quotes: It's obviously expensive. But cold. Completely impersonal. No photographs. No mementoes. No human history.
Binders, reference materials and hardbound volumes -- all of it about maritime law.

relation_updates: Marie explores Bourne's private space with growing comfort
status_updates: apartment is impersonal and devoid of personal history
auxiliary.persona_anchor: active investigation into past through physical exploration and use of technology

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne forces access to the morgue log, rips a page, and flees with Marie after assaulting the boss and silencing attendants, escalating tension and suspicion.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: investigator using bribery and force to access morgue records
timeline_nodes.salient_development: tears logbook page and assaults morgue boss to obtain evidence
timeline_nodes.goal_state: obtain the logbook page to identify who claimed Kane's body
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: fleeing with the stolen logbook page after assaulting the morgue boss
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: identity of who claimed Kane's body and consequences of the assault
evidence_quotes: he's ripping -- tearing the page out of the book --
BOURNE just slammed him against the wall. Hard.

relation_updates: protects Marie by having her wait outside
status_updates: becomes fugitive after assaulting morgue boss
auxiliary.persona_anchor: determination to get answers through direct, sometimes violent, action

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne escapes after a massive explosion; physically exhausted, emotionally shattered, as an intense action sequence looms ahead.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: assassin who failed to set bomb and is escaping
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne admits he didn't set the bomb and escapes during the Professor's attack on Wombosi's compound.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: physically weary and emotionally shattered after fleeing the scene
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: why he couldn't set the bomb and what his true mission is
evidence_quotes: WOMBOSI You didn't set the bomb. Why?
BOURNE not sure -- about any of it --
So Bourne escapes.
Physically he's just weary. Emotionally he's fucked.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: uncertainty and conflict regarding his assassin role

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne and Marie catch a breather on the train until the Professor attacks, leading to a brutal fight on the Bir Hakeim bridge; Marie intervenes with a shotgun, giving Bourne the upper hand.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: combatant in a brutal fight on a moving metro car
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marie shoots the Professor with a shotgun during the fight
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne has the shotgun and is aiming it at the downed Professor
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the Professor is wounded but not confirmed neutralized
evidence_quotes: BAM!!! The PROFESSOR drops to the ground -- behind him -- MARIE wields the shot gun.
And BOURNE takes the gun from her -- standing there -- reloading -- both barrels -- raising the gun -- aiming it --

relation_updates: Marie actively saves Bourne's life, deepening their bond
status_updates: gains the upper hand in the fight due to Marie's intervention
auxiliary.persona_anchor: uses combat skills in the fight and accepts Marie's intervention

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A dying professor hints Bourne is trapped by Treadstone, then dies; Bourne finds a blood-covered electronic pager, recognizing it, as Marie urges escape.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: questioning the dying Professor about his pursuers
timeline_nodes.salient_development: learns from the Professor that both are linked to Treadstone
timeline_nodes.goal_state: find out who else is coming and what Treadstone is
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Professor dead, Bourne has a blood-covered pager, and Marie urges escape
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: why Treadstone won't let Bourne go and its exact nature
evidence_quotes: Treadstone... both of us...
BOURNE reaching into THE PROFESSOR'S POCKET and -- INSERT -- THE E-PHONE PAGER -- covered in blood
BOURNE staring at it. Very familiar to him.
MARIE We've got to go.

relation_updates: the Professor dies, removing an immediate adversary
status_updates: gains critical intelligence about 'Treadstone' and his own origins
auxiliary.persona_anchor: realizes he is connected to Treadstone and recognizes the pager

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne resolves to uncover the truth, unable to protect Marie, who flees as he examines a vibrating e-phone pager with a keypad, holding it closely.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: protector-turned-lone-pursuer
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne gives Marie a locker key and tells her to disappear, ending his protection of her, and commits to finding the end of his mission alone.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: alone, holding the pulsing e-phone pager
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the end of the mission he is pursuing
evidence_quotes: BOURNE I can't protect you anymore.
BOURNE I'm gonna find the end of this.
Holding it. Like a missing organ.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: determined to continue alone

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Conklin reveals Jason Bourne is a fabricated identity, urging him to return for rehabilitation, but Bourne rejects the offer and escapes, leaving Conklin behind.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: confrontational rejector
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Confronts Conklin, learns his identity as Jason Bourne was fabricated by Treadstone, and rejects Conklin's offer to return for rehabilitation.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Escapes the confrontation by scrambling up a wall, leaving Conklin alone on the Quai.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The nature of his true identity and how to proceed after learning he is a fabricated construct.
evidence_quotes: BOURNE What did you do to me?
BOURNE Jason Bourne is dead.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Asserts autonomy by rejecting the fabricated identity of Jason Bourne and refusing to return to Treadstone.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marie runs a scooter rental shack; six months later, Bourne arrives with a new look, asks to rent a scooter without ID, and shares a smile with her before the scene fades out.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bourne visits Marie at her scooter rental shack and they reconnect.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne arrives with a new look, asks to rent a scooter without ID, and shares a smile with Marie.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne and Marie are together at the shack, with Marie agreeing to rent him a scooter.
evidence_quotes: There's BOURNE. A new look. A smile.
BOURNE Think I could rent a scooter?
MARIE It's not a problem. Her turn to smile.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bourne adopts a new appearance and engages in a peaceful interaction with Marie.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Jason Bourne, an amnesiac fugitive, navigates a dangerous world while investigating his forgotten past. He forms a pivotal relationship with Marie, confronts violent adversaries, and uncovers the truth about his fabricated identity as part of Treadstone. Ultimately, he rejects his past life and finds peace with Marie.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 34、INT. U.S. CONSULATE ZURICH -- VISA ROOM -- DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marie, a German woman, confronts a consulate clerk, admitting to a fraudulent marriage for immigration but claiming she was the victim, having paid $4,000 to a man who was already married, and now seeks a student visa.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: German immigrant arguing with U.S. consulate clerk over visa denial and fraudulent marriage
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Admits to paying $4,000 for a fraudulent marriage, claims she was victimized, and applies for a student visa after losing apartment and visa status
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To obtain a student visa after her marriage-based immigration attempt failed
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has applied for a student visa while admitting to past immigration fraud, with no current address or visa
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether her student visa application will be approved given her admission of fraudulent marriage
evidence_quotes: MARIE -- and so now I lost my apartment, I have no address, and I have no visa, and you keep telling me how much help you cannot give me!
CLERK So now you're asking for a student visa? That shuts her up. Yes. Today she's a student.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Assertive and desperate immigrant confronting bureaucracy after being scammed

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 64、EXT. A ROAD ON THE OUTSKIRTS OF ZURICH -- DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: BOURNE offers MARIE twenty thousand dollars to drive him to Paris as if they're a couple, promising she won't get hurt; he threatens to find another ride if she refuses.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: negotiator for driving deal to Paris
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marie negotiates with Bourne, securing $20,000 payment with $10,000 upfront, a promise of no harm, and agreement to pose as a couple during the drive to Paris.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To receive $20,000 for driving Bourne to Paris without getting hurt.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has agreed to drive Bourne to Paris for $20,000, with $10,000 received upfront, under the condition of no harm and pretending to be a couple.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Bourne will honor his promise of safety and payment upon arrival in Paris.
evidence_quotes: MARIE For twenty thousand dollars.
BOURNE Okay. (beat) Twenty thousand. Ten now. Ten there.
MARIE And I don't get hurt. I get twenty thousand dollars and I don't get hurt.

relation_updates: now traveling with Bourne as fake couple
status_updates: agreed to drive Bourne to Paris
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Pragmatic negotiator focused on financial gain and personal safety.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne reveals he has amnesia, unable to remember anything before two weeks ago, shocking Marie, who reacts with anger and disbelief as she speeds dangerously.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: driver and reluctant accomplice
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Learns Bourne has amnesia, shifting understanding of him from strange client to someone with severe, dangerous condition

relation_updates: Bourne's amnesia disclosure creates new tension and disbelief
status_updates: Driving a stolen car past its return deadline

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Castel, bleeding and panicked, suddenly lunges past Bourne and jumps through the apartment window as the concierge knocks, while Marie remains hysterical and Bourne struggles to respond.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Marie Kreutz, complying with Bourne's commands to hide under the window during a violent attack
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Follows Bourne's urgent instructions to get down and hide as gunfire erupts, showing trust despite initial fear and confusion
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alive and hiding under the window, but traumatized and screaming in fear
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The identity and motive of the attacker, Castel
evidence_quotes: MARIE backing away -- completely freaked
she's doing it -- she's under that frosted window
MARIE -- SCREAMING NOW

relation_updates: Marie's trust in Bourne tested and reinforced as she follows life-saving instructions
status_updates: now direct participant in violent conflict surrounding Bourne
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Trusting under pressure, as she complies with Bourne's life-saving commands

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne, desperate and amnesiac, urges Marie to flee with him after an attack, insisting he can protect her and find answers only if they don't stay, despite her desire to trust authorities.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: shocked fugitive companion pressured to flee
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After a violent attack, Marie is paralyzed with shock and distrusts Bourne, but is persuaded to escape with him due to immediate danger.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Escape the apartment with Bourne to survive
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Preparing to leave Paris with Bourne as a fugitive
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Trust in Bourne is severely damaged, and their future is uncertain
evidence_quotes: MARIE standing there in utter shock -- paralyzed -- the picture in her hand -- the broken glass
I don't trust anybody and I trusted you!
He came to kill us.

relation_updates: trust in Bourne severely damaged but still chooses him over authorities
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Prioritizes survival over trusting authorities

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne and Marie share an intimate moment, reconnecting physically and emotionally as he overcomes hesitation, embraces her, and they kiss, marking a personal turning point for him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Marie offers her passport to Bourne, showing commitment
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marie holds out her passport for Bourne to burn, but he refuses, and they share an intimate moment, leading to a kiss.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marie and Bourne are in a romantic relationship after their kiss.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bourne's identity crisis persists, as he states he cannot live without knowing who he is.
evidence_quotes: there's MARIE standing there. And she's holding out her passport
BOURNE No. (he won't do it) You know who you are. You know what that's worth? That's everything.
she touches him. His shoulder.
they're kissing

relation_updates: offers complete commitment by surrendering identity
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Marie demonstrates loyalty by offering her passport and initiating physical intimacy.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne, evading Marie's questions, insists on returning to the hotel as they part ways in Paris, leaving her distressed and confused.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Marie is distressed and seeks answers from Bourne.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne briefly stops to tell Marie that Nykwana Wombosi owns a yacht with Alliance Security and visited the morgue, then walks away without explanation.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marie stops and reels as Bourne walks away into the Paris night.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Marie is left alone on the street, unsure where to go or what to do.
evidence_quotes: MARIE struggling to keep up.
MARIE What are you doing? -- (he's scaring her) -- Jason -- stop -- talk to me...
MARIE -- I don't know what you're doing and you're scaring me -- what are you looking for? -- what just happened in there?
MARIE just stops. Reeling.

relation_updates: Bourne distances himself, leaving Marie excluded from investigation
status_updates: left alone and uncertain in Paris
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Marie tries to keep up with Bourne and pleads for information, but he ignores her, showing her dependence.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marie urges Bourne to leave and start anew, emphasizing who they want to be. Bourne agrees silently, turns off the light, takes her hand, and they lie together in bed.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: partner proposing escape and new identity
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marie urges Bourne to leave their past behind and states her identity is based on choice, not history, with Bourne agreeing.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to leave with Bourne and live a new life
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: they lie together in bed after agreeing to leave
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether they can successfully escape their past
evidence_quotes: It doesn't matter who you were before. It's who you want to be. That's all that matters.
I say we leave here. We leave this place. We go until we can't go anymore.
Yes. That's who I want to be.

relation_updates: Bourne agrees to Marie's proposal, strengthening bond
status_updates: commits to future based on choice, not past
auxiliary.persona_anchor: self-determined and forward-looking

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 128、INT. HOTEL DE LA PAIX -- LOBBY -- DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne warns of danger, grabs a shotgun and shells, locks the clerk out, and moves toward the back door with Marie, preparing for a threat.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: follower acting on Bourne's danger warning
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne warns of imminent threat and Marie immediately follows his commands to hide and flee
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: with Bourne, moving towards the back door to escape the hotel
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: identity of the pursuer is unknown to her
evidence_quotes: MARIE dropping off the key.
MARIE doesn't need a second warning
MARIE Who is it? Who's out there?
she's grabbing her purse, clearing out of the room.

relation_updates: Marie trusts Bourne's judgment without question
status_updates: from safe departure to active danger
auxiliary.persona_anchor: compliant in emergency

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne and Marie catch a breather on the train until the Professor attacks, leading to a brutal fight on the Bir Hakeim bridge; Marie intervenes with a shotgun, giving Bourne the upper hand.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: intervenes in fight to save Bourne
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shoots the Professor with a shotgun during the fight on the train, causing him to drop to the ground.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Professor is incapacitated on the ground; Bourne retrieves the shotgun and is aiming it.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: still on run with active pursuers
evidence_quotes: IN THE FIRST METRO CAR BOURNE and MARIE finally getting a breather
BAM!!! The PROFESSOR drops to the ground -- behind him -- MARIE wields the shot gun

status_updates: has taken lethal action against assassin
auxiliary.persona_anchor: uses lethal force to protect Bourne when threatened

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne resolves to uncover the truth, unable to protect Marie, who flees as he examines a vibrating e-phone pager with a keypad, holding it closely.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: companion forced to separate for safety
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Takes locker key from Bourne and runs away after he states he cannot protect her anymore.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: alone with locker key, running into hiding
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether she can start a new life and stay safe
evidence_quotes: She takes it. Staring at him. Simply refusing to cry.
MARIE takes one last look. And she's running --

relation_updates: Bourne ends partnership for her safety
auxiliary.persona_anchor: self-reliant, refusing to cry in adversity

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marie runs a scooter rental shack; six months later, Bourne arrives with a new look, asks to rent a scooter without ID, and shares a smile with her before the scene fades out.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: scooter rental shack owner
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Operates scooter rental shack and reunites with Bourne, allowing him to rent a scooter without ID
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Continues running her business after a friendly interaction with Bourne
evidence_quotes: MARIE coming out of the shack with two helmets.
MARIE turns back and -- There's BOURNE.
MARIE It's not a problem.

relation_updates: reunites with Bourne in friendly context
status_updates: owns and operates scooter rental business
auxiliary.persona_anchor: independent business owner

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Marie Kreutz begins as a desperate German woman seeking a student visa after a fraudulent marriage. She enters a transactional agreement with amnesiac Jason Bourne, which evolves into a romantic partnership and active fugitive life. After surviving violent attacks and participating in dangerous missions, Bourne sends her into hiding for her safety, and she successfully establishes a new life.
